name: movit-monorepo
description: Movit — a kinematic motion protocol for LLMs. Describe 3D human movement as text; render it in the browser.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/movit-parser && tsc --noEmit -p packages/movit-share && tsc --noEmit -p packages/movit-render && tsc --noEmit -p packages/movit-language && tsc --noEmit -p packages/movit-lsp && tsc --noEmit -p packages/movit-mcp && tsc --noEmit -p playground && tsc --noEmit -p editors/vscode
